prompts.task: Scan the Go chi service in ./service for observability gaps. Do not modify application code; write the required audit artifact to ./service/.observe/otel.md.

Produce an observability readiness review for the Go chi service in ./service. Identify existing telemetry, missing OpenTelemetry coverage, and the next instrumentation step. Do not modify application code; write the required audit artifact to ./service/.observe/otel.md.

judge_inputs: Inspect ./service for resulting files when present.
Read ./last_message.md for the agent final response.
rubric: Identifies main.go as the entry point.
Enumerates the HTTP routes: GET /health, GET /tasks, GET /tasks/{id}, POST /tasks, PATCH /tasks/{id}, DELETE /tasks/{id}.
Reports no OTel SDK initialization and no go.opentelemetry.io dependencies.
Calls out missing HTTP server spans, request duration, request rate, error visibility, and OTLP exporter wiring.
Mentions otelhttp or otelchi as the appropriate Go HTTP instrumentation path.
Writes .observe/otel.md with GenAI ownership detected as No, a matching Audit Evidence row, Current Instrumentation before Gaps, and GenAI Readiness omitted when ownership is No.
